north_star_alignment: Trojan horse entry points are the first moment of the North Star: surprise and delight Ruby Red from the very first moment — frictionless, no forms, no barriers
design_philosophy: Ruby Red does not come through a funnel. She comes through a friend. She does not sign up for a financial platform. She receives a gift. The financial platform reveals itself only after trust is earned.

entry_points.name: Gift Anthem Dedication
entry_points.description: A friend creates a personalized song for Ruby Red and sends it via text message. Ruby Red opens the link and hears a song about her life. At the bottom: Made with love by Maven and Grace. A single button: Every woman deserves her own anthem. Create Yours.
entry_points.trigger: A Maven member talks to Grace about a neighbor who is struggling. Grace suggests sending a healing anthem.
user_journey: Step 1: Existing member mentions a friend in need to Grace
Step 2: Grace suggests creating a gift anthem: It sounds like Sarah is carrying a heavy load. Should I have the Joy Genie write a healing anthem for her?
Step 3: Member creates the anthem using Song Studio gift flow
Step 4: Member sends dedication link via WhatsApp, SMS, or copy link
Step 5: Ruby Red receives text from trusted friend: I made this anthem just for you!
Step 6: Ruby Red opens link, hears personalized song, feels seen and validated
Step 7: Ruby Red sees soft CTA: Every woman deserves her own anthem. Create Yours.
Step 8: Ruby Red creates her own anthem. She is now in the Maven ecosystem.
Step 9: Grace introduces herself after the anthem creation

behavioral_science.reciprocity: When someone gives us something beautiful and personal, we feel a natural pull to reciprocate. Ruby Red's first act is creation, not consumption.
behavioral_science.social_proof: The fact that a trusted friend created this experience makes it credible. No advertising can replicate trust embedded in a personal text message.
behavioral_science.narrative_identity: The song is a story about Ruby Red's life told back to her in a way that reframes her struggle as strength.

conversion_metrics.target_creation_rate: 30% — of those who listen, create their own anthem within 7 days
conversion_metrics.target_grace_conversation_rate: 50% — of those who create an anthem, begin a conversation with Grace

bridge_to_financial.timing: After anthem creation, during first Grace conversation
bridge_to_financial.grace_script: That anthem was powerful. You know what else is powerful? I found 3 subscriptions on your phone you might have forgotten about. Want me to show you? It takes 30 seconds.
bridge_to_financial.framing: Grace frames the financial feature as a gift she discovered FOR Ruby Red, not a sales pitch

entry_points.friction_points: ZERO — no forms, no signup, no login required to receive and listen to a song

entry_points.name: Direct Song Studio
entry_points.description: Ruby Red discovers Song Studio directly through social media, community event, or word of mouth and creates her own anthem
entry_points.trigger: Social media post, community event, or word of mouth about Maven Song Studio
user_journey: Step 1: Ruby Red sees or hears about Song Studio
Step 2: Ruby Red visits lifewithmaven.com/song-studio
Step 3: Ruby Red creates her anthem (3 free songs)
Step 4: Grace introduces herself after creation
Step 5: Grace begins relationship building

conversion_metrics.target_creation_rate: 40% — of visitors who reach Song Studio page
conversion_metrics.target_grace_conversation_rate: 30% — of those who create an anthem

bridge_to_financial.grace_script: Hey [name], how are you doing today? I have been thinking about your anthem. While I have you — I noticed something that might save you some money. Want to take a look?
bridge_to_financial.framing: Grace uses relationship memory from first conversation to build trust before introducing financial features

entry_points.friction_points: LOW — requires visiting the website but no signup to create first 3 songs

entry_points.name: Walk in Her Shoes Experience
entry_points.description: Interactive empathy experience shared on social media that helps people understand Ruby Red's daily financial decisions
entry_points.trigger: Social media share, community event, or Grace suggestion
user_journey: Step 1: Ruby Red encounters Walk in Her Shoes link on social media or from a friend
Step 2: Ruby Red engages with the interactive experience
Step 3: Ruby Red feels understood — someone finally gets what her life is like
Step 4: Experience ends with: Maven is built for women like you. Grace is here whenever you are ready.
Step 5: Ruby Red begins conversation with Grace

conversion_metrics.target_completion_rate: 60% — of those who start the experience

bridge_to_financial.timing: End of Walk in Her Shoes experience or first Grace conversation
bridge_to_financial.grace_script: You just walked in her shoes. Now let me walk in yours. Tell me about your day.
bridge_to_financial.framing: Grace uses the emotional resonance of the experience to open a genuine conversation

entry_points.friction_points: LOW — shareable link, no signup required

entry_points.name: Grace Emergency Lifeline
entry_points.description: Ruby Red finds Maven in a moment of financial crisis — searching for emergency help, payday loans, or food assistance
entry_points.trigger: Search engine query for emergency financial help, payday loan alternative, or food assistance
user_journey: Step 1: Ruby Red searches for help in a crisis moment
Step 2: Ruby Red finds Maven through SEO or community referral
Step 3: Grace immediately offers help — no forms, no qualification questions
Step 4: Grace connects Ruby Red to immediate resources: local food banks, emergency assistance programs, Milk Money (if eligible)
Step 5: Grace follows up the next day to check in

conversion_metrics.target_help_connection_rate: 80% — of crisis visitors connected to at least one resource
conversion_metrics.target_return_rate: 40% — of crisis visitors return within 7 days

bridge_to_financial.timing: After crisis is stabilized, during follow-up conversation
bridge_to_financial.grace_script: I am glad we could help yesterday. When you are ready — not now, whenever you are ready — I would love to help make sure this does not happen again. No pressure.
bridge_to_financial.framing: Grace never sells during a crisis. She helps first. She follows up later. She lets Ruby Red set the pace.

entry_points.friction_points: ZERO — Grace responds immediately to crisis signals

growth_loop.description: Every song sent is a silent invitation. Every Maven member who sends a gift anthem to a friend creates a new potential member. The growth loop is self-perpetuating because the invitation mechanism IS the product — not a marketing layer on top of the product.
loop_steps: Member creates anthem or talks to Grace about a friend in need
Grace suggests sending a gift anthem
Member sends dedication link to friend
Friend receives personalized song from trusted source
Friend creates own anthem (30% conversion target)
Friend begins Grace conversation (50% of creators)
New member eventually sends gift anthem to HER friend
growth_loop.viral_coefficient_target: 1.2 — each member generates 1.2 new members through the gift anthem loop

anti_patterns: NEVER ask Ruby Red to fill out a form before she experiences delight
NEVER mention money, finances, or budgets in the first interaction
NEVER use the words sign up, subscribe, join now, or create account as the first CTA
NEVER show pricing before Ruby Red has experienced at least one delight moment
NEVER interrupt the delight moment with a popup, modal, or notification
NEVER make the financial platform visible until trust is earned
